roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:120 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  57  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO:04-08-14,/X:CLIENT WILL BE ALLOWED TO DO THE REMAINING PORTION OF HIS JAIL SENTENCEAT THE MEDICAL RESPITE LOCATED ON 1171 MISSION STREET IN SAN FRANCISCO,  HEWILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE MEDICAL RESPITE BY THE STAFF - PAROLE AGENTS OFTHE DIVISION OF ADULT PAROLE,  THE COURT HAS SIGNED AN ORDER RELEASING THECLIENT TO THE STAFF - PAROLE AGENTS OF THE DIVISION OF ADULT PAROLE,   A BED IS AVAILABLE FOR CLIENT ON WEDNESDAY, JUNE 4, 2014,  THIS HAS BEEN CONFIRMED BY NICOLE BROOKS OF JAIL HEALTH REENTRY SERVICES WHO ASSISTED IN THE CLIENT'S PLACEMENT AT THE MEDICAL RESPITE,CLIENT MUST REMAIN AT THE MEDICALRESPITE AS A CONDITION OF HIS PAROLE,  HEMAY LEAVE THE MEDICAL RESPITE ONLYIF HE IS MEDICALLY CLEARED BY STAFF,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC 3000,08//PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS AND THE COURT FINDS PROBABLE CAUSE,/NB/CONTD:STATUS OF FELONY/
/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC 3000,08//CONTD:STATUS OF PLACEMENT AT RESPITE CENTER/
/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC 3000,08//CONTD:STATUS OF PLACEMENT IN RESPITE/

/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/CONTD:STATUS OF PLACEMENT AT RESPITE CENTER/
/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/CONTD:STATUS OF POSSIBLE PLACEMENT AT A RESPITE CENTER/
/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC /CONTD:STATUS OF MISDEMEANORS/
